reviews.comment:
Se nota que hay una organización, y los roles están claros. Pero como cliente les pido más amabilidad. Lo hacen bien, solo que es bueno saludar y recibir a los clientes de forma amable.

(Translated by Google)
It's clear there's an organization, and the roles are well-defined. But as a customer, I'd appreciate a bit more friendliness. They do their jobs well, but it would be nice to greet and welcome customers more warmly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10539008023529743134/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoNV9Mb0VBEAE

(Translated by Google)
All it needs are some showers.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10539008023529743134/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoa08yd3F3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre cargamos nafta en ésa estación de servicio, hoy estaba descargando el camión combustible se fue , los playeros se tomaron 1 hora para hacer papeles y nosotros esperando al rayo del sol y tuvimos que quejarnos para que pudieran atendernos . No es justo

(Translated by Google)
We always fill up at that gas station. Today, the fuel truck was unloading and then it left. The attendants took an hour to do paperwork while we waited in the blazing sun, and we had to complain before they'd even serve us. It's not fair.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10539008023529743134/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoOF9udmtnRRAB
